name: value-first-e2e-batch
description: Auto-discover highest-value work, full delivery pipeline
description_html: Auto-discover highest-value work, full delivery pipeline. The master plan.
html_quote: Boys, I got a plan. And this time it's a good one.

name: full-delivery
description: Default maximum-assurance delivery — loops through implementation, tests, quality sweep, validation, and bug closure until truly green or blocked
description_html: Default maximum-assurance delivery. Loops through implementation, tests, quality sweep, validation, and bug closure until truly green or blocked.
html_quote: Just get 'er done, Julian. And keep goin' until it's actually done.

name: full-delivery
description: Maximum-assurance delivery — keep looping until validate certifies done or records a real blocker. Default continuation target for active recap/status/handoff follow-up.
description_html: Maximum-assurance delivery. Keep looping until validate certifies done or records a real blocker. Default continuation target for active recap/status/handoff follow-up.
html_quote: No loose ends. All green or we keep going.

name: devops-to-doc
description: Focused DevOps execution + operational verification + docs sync
description_html: Focused DevOps execution for CI/CD, build, deployment, monitoring, observability, and release automation.
html_quote: Get the rack humming and keep the park online.

name: simplify-to-doc
description: Simplify an existing implementation, prove it still works, then sync docs
html_quote: Strip it down to the trailer frame.

name: spec-review-to-doc
description: Audit specs for freshness, classify trust levels, produce maintenance report
description_html: Audit specs for freshness, classify trust levels, produce a maintenance report.
html_quote: Lasers on the trailer park, boys.

name: chaos-hardening
description: Iterative chaos + bugfix cycles until clean
description_html: Iterative chaos + bugfix cycles until clean or limit reached.
html_quote: We're in the eye of a shiticane, Randy.

name: bugfix-fastlane
description: Fast bug closure with regression, hardening, validation, and audit
description_html: Fast bug closure. In. Fix. Out. Mandatory reproduce-before/verify-after.
html_quote: Get in, get out. That's a good plan.

name: validate-only
description: Run validation gates only
description_html: Run validation gates only. Things are about to get serious.
html_quote: Randy, put a shirt on. We got company.

name: stochastic-quality-sweep
description: Randomized probing — you never know where they'll hit
description_html: Randomized adversarial probing. You never know where they'll hit, and follow-up commands like `fix all found` should resume the sweep instead of dropping into raw specialist work.
html_quote: BOTTLE KIDS! (runs for cover)

name: harden-gaps-to-doc
description: Thorough pre-release sweep
description_html: The most thorough pre-release sweep. Uncomfortable truths revealed.
html_quote: Conky says you missed something, Bubbles.

name: product-to-delivery
description: Full pipeline: analyst → UX → design → implement → ship
description_html: Full pipeline: analyst → UX → design → scopes → implement → test → quality.
html_quote: Freedom 35, boys! This is the one!

name: docs-only
description: Documentation maintenance only
description_html: Managed-doc maintenance only. J-Roc publishes the truth.
html_quote: You're sayin' 'gnome sayin'' too many times — 80, 90 times? That's too many times.

name: iterate
description: Continue scope-by-scope implementation
description_html: Priority-driven scope-by-scope execution. Picks the next thing and does it.
html_quote: Keep going, boys. Don't stop.

name: resume-only
description: Resume from last session state
description_html: Resume from saved session state. Pick up where you left off.
html_quote: Roll that tape back, boys.

name: spec-scope-hardening (with analyze)
description: Business analysis + UX exploration only
description_html: Business analysis + UX exploration. No implementation — just discovery.
html_quote: What's the big idea here, Julian?

name: test-to-doc
description: Run tests, fix failures, update docs
description_html: Run tests, fix failures, publish docs. Quick verification pass.
html_quote: Quick and dirty, boys.

name: audit-only
description: Run audit phase only
description_html: Run audit phase only. Pure compliance check.
html_quote: Open and shut case.

name: stabilize-to-doc
description: Stability fixes → test → docs
description_html: Stability diagnosis → DevOps execution → test → docs. Bill finds it, Tommy ships it.
html_quote: ... (Bill just points at the problem.)

name: improve-existing
description: Analyze, harden, improve → test → docs
description_html: Analyze, harden, close gaps, improve → test → docs. Evolutionary improvement.
html_quote: Survival of the fitness, boys.

name: product-to-delivery (with existing impl)
description: Reconcile stale artifacts, redesign an existing feature, then deliver
description_html: Reconcile stale artifacts, redesign the feature, then deliver it through the full quality chain.
html_quote: Same lot, boys. New trailer.

name: spec-scope-hardening
description: Tighten specs and scope definitions
description_html: Tighten specs and scope definitions. No implementation, just planning quality.
html_quote: Harden up, boys. This has gotta be tight.

name: harden-to-doc
description: Harden → test → docs
description_html: Harden existing code, fix issues, then test and doc. Prepare for the storm.
html_quote: The shit winds are coming, Randy. Harden up.

name: gaps-to-doc
description: Gap analysis → test → docs
description_html: Gap analysis → implement fixes → test → docs. Find what's missing.
html_quote: What are ya lookin' at my gut fer?

name: chaos-to-doc
description: Chaos → test → docs
description_html: Chaos probing → fix → docs. Break it, then document what happened.
html_quote: We broke it. Now document what happened.

name: reconcile-to-doc
description: Reconcile conflicts → test → docs
description_html: Reconcile stale state, fix conflicts → test → docs. Told you so.
html_quote: I toad a so. I f***ing toad a so.

name: validate-to-doc
description: Validate + audit + docs
description_html: Validate + audit + docs. The camera crew watches and documents.
html_quote: (camera crew just watches)

name: spec-scope-hardening (with analyze + socratic)
description: Explore ideas before building — produces design artifacts, no code
description_html: Explore ideas before building — produces design artifacts, no code.
html_quote: Let me think about it over a couple smokes.

name: retro-to-simplify
description: Data-driven simplification — retro finds hotspots, then simplify fixes them
description_html: Data-driven simplification. Retro analyzes git history for bug magnets and hotspots, then Donny simplifies the worst offenders.
html_quote: The liquor shows me the problems. Donny tapes them up.

name: retro-to-harden
description: Data-driven hardening — retro finds bug magnets, then harden targets them
description_html: Data-driven hardening. Retro finds bug magnets and worsening hotspots, then the hardening pipeline targets those areas.
html_quote: The liquor shows me the weak spots. Harden up, boys.

name: retro-quality-sweep
description: Retro finds hotspots, then the deterministic quality crew cleans them up
description_html: Retro-guided quality sweep. The liquor finds the hotspot mess, then simplify, harden, and the rest of the crew clean it up deterministically.
html_quote: The liquor finds the mess. Then the whole crew sweeps it clean.

name: retro-to-review
description: Data-driven review — retro finds risks, then code-review diagnoses them
description_html: Data-driven code review. Retro identifies highest-risk files, then Green Bastard reviews them. Read-only diagnostic.
html_quote: The liquor shows me where to look. Green Bastard tells me what's broken.

name: release-planning-to-doc
description: Produce or refresh a phase release packet (vision/features/actions/business-plan/deployment/marketing/monetization/ops-scalability), enforce Product Direction Surfaces trio + carry-forward + cross-product coordination
description_html: Produce or refresh a phase release packet (vision / features / actions / business-plan / deployment / marketing / monetization / ops-scalability); enforces Product Direction Surfaces trio + carry-forward + cross-product coordination.
html_quote: Plans within plans within plans.

name: idea-to-release-completion
description: Full lifecycle: idea -> release packet bootstrap-or-refresh -> spec/design/scopes -> implement/test/validate/audit/chaos -> final release packet refresh that flips the capability to `delivered`. Closes the loop the standard `product-to-delivery` mode used to leave open. Owned by Sonny "Iron Lung" Smith for the release phases.
description_html: Full lifecycle: idea → release-packet bootstrap → spec/design/scopes → implement/test/validate/audit/chaos → final packet refresh that flips capability to `delivered`.
html_quote: It ain't rocket appliances, but it works.

name: release-train-cut
description: DVS cuts a candidate at a trunk SHA for a named train. Tag + signed candidate artifact, no deployment.
description_html: DVS cuts a candidate at a trunk SHA for a named train. Signed candidate artifact, no deployment.
html_quote: Cut it, tag it, ship it.

name: release-train-promote
description: Pointer-swap a candidate between slots on a train (e.g. staging→prod). Requires backup-freshness + restore-drill currency.
description_html: Pointer-swap a candidate between slots on a train. Requires backup-freshness + restore-drill currency.
html_quote: Pointer swap. Don't rebuild.

name: release-train-rollback
description: Revert the train pointer to the previous candidate. Pure pointer swap, no rebuild.
description_html: Revert the train pointer to the previous candidate. Pure pointer swap. No rebuild.
html_quote: Back her up. We've been here before.

name: release-train-retire
description: End-of-life a train: requires `flag-retirement` completion and clean upkeep ledger.
description_html: End-of-life a train: requires flag-retirement completion and clean upkeep ledger.
html_quote: This train's done. Flags off the books first.

name: release-train-status-all
description: J-Roc's portfolio rollup across every declared train. Read-only multi-train status snapshot.
description_html: J-Roc's portfolio rollup across every declared train. Read-only multi-train snapshot.
html_quote: Every park, one view. Knawmsayin?

name: propagate-forward
description: J-Roc forward-merges a fix/feature across `defaultFlow` train edges per `propagation-policy.yaml`.
html_quote: Same fix, every park, knawmsayin?

name: propagate-backport
description: J-Roc backports under explicit train-owner approval token. Reverse-edge propagation.
description_html: J-Roc backports under explicit train-owner approval token. Reverse-edge, audited.
html_quote: Permission slip first. Then the cherry-pick.

name: propagate-audit
description: Read-only drift detection between declared trains. Reports unpropagated changes; never mutates.
html_quote: Just lookin'. Not movin' nothin'.

name: incident-fastlane
description: Production incident chain: triage → fix → validate → propagate → audit. Highest-priority operational lane.
html_quote: Trailer's on fire, boys. Cory, grab the hose.

name: framework-health
description: `bubbles.retro target: framework` — proposal-first self-observation of the framework itself. Writes only into `improvements/`, never auto-mutates framework files.
description_html: `bubbles.retro target: framework` — proposal-first self-observation of the framework. Writes only into `improvements/`.
html_quote: Check yo'self before you wreck yo'self.

name: journey-refinement
description: Guided live-product walkthrough toward a goal — bubbles.journey verifies UI/API/telemetry/data at each step, captures friction, and routes refinements to owners
description_html: Guided live-product walkthrough. Cathy Curtis walks you through the live product toward a goal, verifies each step across UI/API/telemetry/data, and routes refinements to their owners.
html_quote: Come on, I'll walk you through it — and tell you straight what's broken.

name: upkeep-backup-verify
description: Run scheduled backup verification (T1/T2/T3/T4). Calendar-driven via `config/upkeep-calendar.yaml`.
description_html: Scheduled backup verification (T1/T2/T3/T4). Calendar-driven via `config/upkeep-calendar.yaml`.
html_quote: Backup or it didn't happen.

name: upkeep-restore-drill
description: Weekly restore drill — proves a backup can be recovered. Failed drill blocks next promote.
html_quote: Rehearse the rescue. Every week. No exceptions.

name: upkeep-bcdr-drill
description: Quarterly BCDR drill — full disaster-recovery exercise into isolated namespace.
html_quote: Whole park, from zero. Time it.

name: upkeep-patch-cycle
description: Scheduled patch/dependency-rotation cycle. Recorded in upkeep ledger.
html_quote: Patch the trailer. Log the patch.

name: upkeep-secret-rotation
description: Scheduled secret/credential rotation. Recorded in upkeep ledger.
html_quote: New locks. Old keys go in the fire.

name: upkeep-flag-cleanup
description: Remove feature flags and their dead branches before `release-train-retire`.
html_quote: Flag's done. Branch is dead. Out it goes.

name: upkeep-compliance-sweep
description: Quarterly compliance evidence collection → `docs/Compliance_Report.md` (G117–G120). Treena gathers, Ted certifies.
description_html: Quarterly compliance evidence collection → `docs/Compliance_Report.md` (G117–G120). Treena gathers, Ted certifies.
html_quote: Evidence, evidence, evidence. Then sign-off.

name: adapter-readiness-to-packet
description: Deliver an adapter to readiness state; packet certifies the adapter is ready for downstream consumption. Terminal status: `delivered_pending_activation`.
description_html: Deliver an adapter to readiness state; packet certifies readiness for downstream consumption. Terminal: `delivered_pending_activation`.
html_quote: Adapter's done. Operator's call when to flip it.

name: dark-launch-shipped
description: Code shipped behind a default-off flag; terminal status `delivered_pending_activation` until flag flip.
description_html: Code shipped behind a default-off flag; terminal `delivered_pending_activation` until flag flip.
html_quote: Shipped. Quiet. Flag's still off.

name: migration-shipped-pending-cutover
description: Migration code shipped but cutover not executed; terminal status `delivered_pending_activation` until operator cutover.
description_html: Migration code shipped but cutover not executed; terminal `delivered_pending_activation` until operator cutover.
html_quote: Code's there. Operator's gotta pull the lever.

name: redteam-to-doc
description: Adversarial red-team attack on a finished result (Green Bastard); finding-owned remediation chain then validate/audit/docs. Off by default.
description_html: Adversarial red-team attack on a finished result (Green Bastard). Finding-owned remediation chain, then validate/audit/docs. Off by default.
html_quote: You say it's done? Prove it.

name: production-adversarial-probe
description: Bounded, armed, read-only chaos-monkey probing of a LIVE system (Green Bastard on a leash). Requires arming + target allowlist; restore-or-fix; never certifies.
description_html: Bounded, armed, read-only chaos-monkey probing of a LIVE system (Green Bastard on a leash). Requires arming + target allowlist; restore-or-fix; never certifies.
html_quote: This is my park now. Let's see what holds.
